keyPoints: What is Big Data Analytics: Big data analytics is the process of examining data sets to discover patterns, relationships, and other insights that can inform business decisions or solve complex problems.
Classification of Analytics: Data analytics can be classified into two main types: Descriptive Analytics and Predictive Analytics.
Importance of Big Data Analytics: Big data analytics is important because it can provide insights that can help businesses make data-driven decisions, improve operations, and reduce costs.
Technologies used in Big Data Environment: Big data analytics involves the use of various technologies such as Hadoop, Spark, NoSQL databases, and cloud computing.
